title: ornithogalum orthophyllum subsp. monticola
intro: Ornithogalum orthophyllum subsp. monticola, also known as the mountain star of life, is a plant species within the Asparagaceae family. It is commonly used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ornithogalum orthophyllum subsp. monticola include its potential to treat a range of ailments, from fever and rheumatism to skin conditions and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve drying and powdering the roots, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or as a topical treatment.
